name: =?UTF-8?B?TWFyY2/igJlzIGlQYWQ=?=
subject: about next week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, Next week, the Democrats are going to have their first presidential debate. Our team is already preparing to fight back against their attacks and misleading claims. Peter, we know that Hillary Clinton's campaign is failing as her other opponents gain momentum, other candidates are considering entering the race, and she's plagued by ongoing scandals. [**She's desperate and that means one thing: they're going to come after me (again) next week.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351889:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r) Some Democrats _(including Hillary Clinton's former campaign manager)_ have publicly admitted that my candidacy is Hillary's biggest worry. We need your help to finish up preparations for their attacks. [**_Click here to make an immediate contribution to our Democrat Debate Fact Checking Fund using one of our quick links:_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351889:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)
---
| [_**> > Donate $10**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351888:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)[ _**> > Donate $25**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351887:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r) _**[> > Donate $50 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351886:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)<< SUGGESTED**_[ _**> > Donate $100**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351885:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)[ _**> > Click here to donate another amount**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351889:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)
---
| Since Hillary Clinton can't talk about her own record and hasn't articulated a positive, forward-looking vision for our future, all she can do is attack me. We know it's coming and I'm asking you an critical question: Peter, if you think it's important that Americans get the real story -- rather than what the mainstream media covering the debate will tell them -- [_**then I'm counting on you to pitch in.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351889:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r) We can't do it without your support. I'll check back in with our team tomorrow to see how our Democrat Debate Fact Checking Fund is doing and I hope I'll see your name on the list, Peter! Marco Rubio
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44351889:6tqidyLN0:m:1:1349778030:B4AD67FA87EBBCBE7531437B4E04FAB6:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Matt Carle
subject: Want to fix Washington?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=100691&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FReformer) Friend, For seven years, we've had a President in the Oval Office who can deliver a great speech. Now it's time to elect someone who can deliver _results_. No one has shaken up the system more than John Kasich. He forced the Washington politicians to balance the federal budget, and in Ohio, he fought the special interests to turn the huge deficit he inherited into a huge surplus. We need John Kasich's tough leadership in Washington. Unlike the other candidates running for president, he doesn't just give speeches. John Kasich goes against the grain and gets things done - for us. [Check out our latest ad below to learn more.](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=100691&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FReformer) [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=100691&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FReformer) **[Please share this ad with your friends and family. Help spread the word by chipping in $50, $100, $150 or whatever you can give today!](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=100691&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FDonate)** [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=100691&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) Thank you for your support! **Matt Carle**
Executive Director
New Day for America
| Please [click here](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.pl?r=35444401&l=20193&s=N28F&m=100691&c=1559159) if you wish to unsubscribe to these emails.

name: Kevin Bingle, Digital Director
subject: Not a fundraising email!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, here are some recent campaign highlights:

**Gov. John Kasich - Fox News: "Hannity"**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927768:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

**Gov. John Kasich - Fox News: "On the Record"**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927769:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

**Gov. John Kasich - ABC's "The View"**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927770:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

**We kicked off our New Hampshire bus tour this week!**

**Watch a short video about our Manchester, N.H headquarters opening:**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927771:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

**VOLUNTEERS:** We're looking for volunteers in Virginia & Illinois to help with our signature gathering efforts to get Gov. Kasich on the primary ballot.

**Sign up at:** [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927772:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

Thanks for your support!

**Kevin Bingle
**Digital Director

P.S. Another Hillary Clinton advisor expressed concern about facing Gov. John Kasich - [watch here:](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30927773:WlIHrxmxN:m:1:958431888:BF195FD35447C091C077D564C960485E:r)

name: Official Clinton Campaign
subject: REMINDER: New Arrivals + Free Shipping
body:
Cozy fall Hillary gear is HERE! | Friend --

You know what’s better than new arrivals? New arrivals that ship for free!

You’ve earned a free shipping credit to use when you spend $50 or more on new arrivals or anything else in the shop.

**All you have to do is add $50 or more of merchandise to your cart, and your Hillary gear will automatically ship for free:**

[**https://shop.hillaryclinton.com/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3MTc5MDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDE4MTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Happy shopping!

The Official Clinton Campaign

name: Team Murphy
subject: Trump or Grayson?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

We have a little game that we thought you'd enjoy. We call it -- **Who Said It: Donald Trump or Alan Grayson?**

Ok, it's not the most creative name. It's self-explanatory. Here's today's:
_On being a member of their political party:_ **" I prefer to think of it as belonging to some kind of gang, like Crips or the Bloods."** _Who do you think said it?_ | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2142/738133e4/3a4b2751/7f8ec11e/2862317462/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008t?refcode=pme151008t_m&recurring=true") | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2142/738133e4/3a4b2751/7f8ec11f/2862317462/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008g?refcode=pme151008g_m&recurring=true")
---|---
Good luck!

Team Murphy
| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2142/738133e4/3a4b2751/7f8ec118/2862317462/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Adam Parkhomenko, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Join Hillary and Terry McAuliffe October 23rd:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary is coming to your neighborhood! | Friend --

Great news -- you have an amazing opportunity to hear from the glass-ceiling breaker herself! Hillary will be in Northern Virgina on October 23rd, and she’d love to see you in person.

Hillary’s hosting a meeting with Governor Terry McAuliffe to talk about her ideas for strengthening Virginia families and how we can get more people involved in our communities. That’s how we’ll put Hillary in the White House -- one real conversation at a time.

**[Here are the details:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**WHAT:** Grassroots organizing meeting with
Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe
**WHEN:** Thursday, October 23rd, 2015
11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m.
**WHERE:** RSVP and we will let you know
once the location is announced!

**[Yes, I'll be there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[I can't make it, but I'll still volunteer! ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
Prepare to be inspired and excited about the country we’re going to build together. Securing a victory for Hillary in 2016 starts right now.

**Space is limited, so be sure to RSVP as soon as possible:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-in-arlington/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Adam

Adam Parkhomenko
Director of Grassroots Engagement
Hillary for America

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3MTkyODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMDcxMzI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Hillary is coming to your neighborhood! | Friend -- Great news -- you have an amazing opportunity to hear from the glass-ceiling breaker herself! Hillary will be in Northern Virgina on October 23rd, and she’d love to see you in person. Hillary’s hosting a meeting with Governor Terry McAuliffe to talk about her ideas for strengthening Virginia families and how we can get more people involved in our communities. That’s how we’ll put Hillary in the White House -- one real conversation at a time. WHAT: Grassroots organizing meeting with Hillary Clinton and Governor Terry McAuliffe WHEN: Thursday, October 23rd, 2015 11:00 a.m. - 2:00 p.m. WHERE: RSVP and we will let you know once the location is announced! Prepare to be inspired and excited about the country we’re going to build together. Securing a victory for Hillary in 2016 starts right now. Space is limited, so be sure to RSVP as soon as possible: Thanks, Adam Adam Parkhomenko Director of Grassroots Engagement Hillary for America ****Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
